states.name: Sakura
states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: Sakura Hayate has never been a very good singer. She's not a particularly skilled dancer either. Still, she sings, and dances, and never stops smiling. Just to see that bright smile, thousands of fans are ready to wait in line for hours before her every performance.

states.name: Sakura
states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: Before the show begins, she takes a moment to tell herself she's going to be okay. Though she seems so cheerful and carefree when on stage, she's the hardest working member of the group, always staying in the rehearsal room long after the others have gone home. This earnestness is what makes her who she is, but it sometimes makes her feel like the pressure of it all is about to crush her.

states.name: Sakura
states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: They were just about to wrap up their last number when it happened. She stumbled and fell, and just stayed down, unable to understand how she could make such a blunder at the very last moment. She felt her eyes well up with tears, when suddenly someone's hand touched her shoulder. "It's OK," one of the other group members said, helping her up with a smile. And just like that, she remembered that she wasn't alone, that they were in this together. Her bright smile back in place, she joined her friends to finish up the last dance of that night.
